title: sophora tomentosa var. littoralis
intro: Sophora tomentosa var. littoralis, also known as the shrub Sophora, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, characterized by its small yellow flowers and compound leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sophora tomentosa var. littoralis include immune system support, anti-aging properties, and potential antiviral treatment for certain diseases. Sophora tomentosa var. littoralis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various health conditions.
